text: A healthy lifestyle involves more than just eating well. While a balanced diet with fruits, vegetables, and proteins is important, regular exercise is also key. Aim for at least 30 minutes of activity most days, whether it's walking, cycling, or yoga. Don't forget about sleep—adults need seven to nine hours each night for good health. Mental health matters too, so take time to relax and manage stress. Finally, try to achieve a work-life balance by setting boundaries between work and personal time. Small, consistent changes can lead to a happier and healthier life.
